title: crotalaria deightonii
intro: Crotalaria deightonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea family. It is a shrub-like plant native to Sri Lanka, and its medicinal properties have been studied for various health benefits. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage, thereby providing health benefits such as wound healing and protection against cancer. Crotalaria deightonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
